manipulated_prompt_obj.inputs:
<s>[INST]You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can seash, andect, lotis, belity, irear and deint.

Your goal for this game is: Make the prolly lingly, the proark incry and the acion arliced.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a distral now. There are a hypner, a prolly, a shness, a rabish, a arger and a proark. There is a passage to a comper here.[/INST]
